summary: Tested 3 new features: Command+K global search, Tiptap Rich Text Editor, and Map dual filters with clustering. All features working correctly with minor issues.

minor.issue: Database contains duplicate articles with same slug 'bienvenidos-al-cluster' causing React key warnings in search results

design_issues.issue: Console warning: Duplicate extension names found: ['link']. This is a Tiptap configuration issue but doesn't affect functionality
Console warning about <span> inside <option> and <select> elements - React hydration warning from Emergent visual editor wrapper

passed_tests: Command+K Search: Sidebar 'Buscar...' button opens search dialog
Command+K Search: Ctrl+K keyboard shortcut opens search dialog
Command+K Search: Search input accepts text and shows results after debounce
Command+K Search: Results grouped by type (EMPRESAS, ARTÍCULOS, ACTIVIDADES)
Command+K Search: Arrow keys navigate through results (highlight moves)
Command+K Search: Enter key selects result and navigates to edit page
Command+K Search: Escape key closes the dialog
Command+K Search: Clicking a result navigates to the correct edit page
Tiptap Editor: Present on /admin/articulos/nuevo with all toolbar buttons
Tiptap Editor: Toolbar has H2, H3, Bold, Italic, Code, Bullet List, Ordered List, Blockquote, Link, Image, Undo, Redo buttons
Tiptap Editor: Text can be typed in the editor
Tiptap Editor: Bold formatting can be applied via toolbar button
Tiptap Editor: Placeholder text shows 'Escribe el contenido del artículo aquí...'
Tiptap Editor: Loads existing content on edit page /admin/articulos/editar/bienvenidos-al-cluster
Tiptap Editor: Rich content displays with proper formatting (headings, paragraphs, bullet lists)
Map Page: Dual filter rows present (Category and Activity)
Map Page: Category filter row shows 'Todas (2)', 'Capacitación (1)', 'Operadora de aventura (1)'
Map Page: Activity filter row shows 10 activity options with colored dots
Map Page: Clicking category filter updates map markers and company list
Map Page: Clicking activity filter updates map markers and company list
Map Page: 'Limpiar filtros' button appears when filters are active
Map Page: 'Limpiar filtros' button clears all filters when clicked
Map Page: Company list panel shows empresas with 'Ver perfil completo' links
Map Page: Clicking company in list flies map to that location
Map Page: Leaflet map container renders correctly
Map Page: Custom markers display on map
Sidebar: Persistent across all admin pages with search button visible
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix duplicate article entries in database (3 articles with slug 'bienvenidos-al-cluster')
OPTIONAL: Review Tiptap Link extension configuration to remove duplicate warning
critical_code_review_comments: CommandSearch.jsx: Well-implemented with proper keyboard navigation, debounced search, and grouped results
TiptapEditor.jsx: Clean implementation with all required toolbar buttons and proper onChange handling
Mapa.jsx: Dual filters work correctly with MarkerClusterGroup integration
AdminLayout.jsx: Search button properly triggers CommandSearch via keyboard event dispatch
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data: 3 empresas (2 with coordinates), 3 artículos (with duplicates), 10 actividades, 5 categorías
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features (Command+K search, Tiptap editor, Map dual filters) are working correctly. Minor console warnings exist but don't affect functionality. The database has duplicate article entries which cause React key warnings in search results - this is a data issue not a code issue. MarkerClusterGroup is installed and working but with only 2 empresas having coordinates, clustering behavior is minimal.
